summary: ExternalSecrets vulnerable to privilege escalation with secret overwriting in github.com/external-secrets/external-secrets/apis
details:
ExternalSecrets vulnerable to privilege escalation with secret overwriting in github.com/external-secrets/external-secrets/apis.

NOTE: The source advisory for this report contains additional versions that could not be automatically mapped to standard Go module versions.
